auth.label: Long-lived Token
auth.description: Kommo long-lived token used as a Bearer token for a private integration. Create a private integration and generate the token from its Keys and scopes tab: https://developers.kommo.com/docs/long-lived-token.

extraFields.label: Subdomain
extraFields.description: Your Kommo account subdomain used to build https://<subdomain>.kommo.com requests. You can enter the subdomain or full account URL; private integration setup is documented at https://developers.kommo.com/docs/private-integration.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Get Kommo account information for the connected account.

with.description: Comma-separated Kommo with parameters to include.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading Kommo data with optional includes.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Kommo.
The raw object returned by Kommo.
